text:
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
Loog freshly grated horseradish, or more to taste
1-2 tbsp double cream

Melt the butter in a large saucepan. Add the onion and leek, cover and cook gently without colouring for 3-4 minutes, stirring every so often, to soften stir in the flour and cook over a low heat for 30 seconds, then gradually stir in the vegetable stock. Bring to the boil, season and simmer for 30 minutes.

Add about two-thirds of the horseradish to the soup and simmer for 5 minutes, then take off the heat. Puree in a blender until smooth, then pass through
A fine-meshed sieve into a clean saucepan.

Taste for seasoning and the horseradish, adding more to taste. You don't need to blend the soup again the extra horseradish gives a nice te lure. Add the
Cream, bring back to a simmer and serve.
